title: In the Palm of My Hand
description: Adachi wanders into Animate and finds Shimamura merchandise. Her immediate reaction? Wanting to buy it all—and swearing to become rich to claim every piece of Shimamura that ever exists.
content:
When I saw Shimamura merch being sold in the store, my first instinct was to doubt my own eyes.

I had only wandered into Animate—a minute from the station—to kill some time, and yet right there at the entrance was a giant Shimamura wall scroll staring back at me. Why? How? Was I dreaming? In my dreams, sure, something like this wouldn't be strange at all.

But even after staring for a long while, the scene didn't fade. And then I noticed something obvious: all the other normal products were displayed around it too. If this were really my dream, would the store have anything not related to Shimamura?

Which meant: this was reality. And as soon as I understood that, a flood of conflicting, inconvenient emotions washed over me.

I didn't want anyone else getting their hands on Shimamura, but the merch was so irresistibly good—that of course other people would buy it.

So then… Should I just buy everything?

Claim all of Shimamura for myself—No. Fantasizing wouldn't help. Every item was expensive, painfully so, and buying the whole set was impossible. Standing in front of the huge tapestry, all I could feel was a heavy, bitter sense of powerlessness.

In the end, even after resisting as hard as I could, one glance into my wallet forced me to give up. But at that moment, I made a firm decision.

'Hey, I'm here! Did you end up buying anything?'

Shimamura arrived a bit later, looking so vividly, unmistakably real that I couldn't help thinking: 'Ah… I'm so glad.'

'Shimamura.'

'Hm? What is it?'

'I'm going to become rich.'

Shimamura blinked, startled—probably because I said that before even greeting her.

'Eh? Oh… um, well—that's… something to look forward to?'

She clearly didn't understand what I meant, but I nodded seriously anyway, as if to reassure her.

When you have money, the world becomes a much bigger place. Sometimes material wealth can bring a surprising sense of emotional security.

Which is why—to collect every single piece of Shimamura merch that will come out from now on, and keep all of it safely in the palm of my hand—I swore to myself: I'll become a wealthy woman.
